notes: Security: OIDC/trusted-proxy logins no longer implicitly become admin - a real per-user role is resolved/created instead
Security: session secret no longer signs cookies with the well-known default value if left unchanged
Security: added missing admin-only checks to ~30 previously-unprotected admin routes
Security: Web Player streaming routes now require an authenticated, enabled session (previously open once a token was known)
Security: trusted-proxy default narrowed to loopback only, webhook secret comparison is now constant-time
Security: Spore TCP server now binds to loopback by default instead of all interfaces
Fix: a transient scraper/cache error on one episode could mark an entire multi-season request failed, discarding already-added seasons
Fix: the retry queue could silently drop a failed retry and stall the rest of that cycle's batch
Fix: cleanup/repair and folder-migration could leave orphaned database rows behind, permanently blocking recreation of a title
Fix: folder rename/merge could corrupt a sibling folder's database paths when one folder name was a prefix of another
Fix: Plex fast-start MP4 cache could corrupt sample offsets for CDN files with a second data block after the moov atom
Fix: HTTP suffix byte-ranges (bytes=-N) were parsed as the first N bytes instead of the last N
Fix: CSRF protection was effectively disabled on ~27 internal API routes
Added: Trakt auto-request from watchlist (capped daily), built into the existing Trakt plugin
Added: MDBList integration (own API key, list sync, capped auto-request)
Added: Auto-approve - per-genre rules with year ranges, follow favorite actors
Added: Discover genre tabs (admin-configurable, per genre + year range)
Added: per-user language filter (include/exclude) in Discover
Added: clickable cast opens actor page with bio, filmography and Follow button
Added: TorBox library scan to backfill missing .strm files
Added: notification settings (Discord/Telegram) in React Settings
Added: real topbar search bar
Added: React Admin dashboard finally routed at /admin (tab next to the classic Jinja page)
Fix: settings-UI overrides silently ignored for Zilean, TMDB, RealDebrid, TorBox, OpenSubtitles, catbox
Fix: mislabeled cams/trailers rejected via file-size-vs-runtime plausibility check
Fix: unreleased titles could pull in fake/cam releases - now blocked via TMDB release date
Fix: multi-season series only got season 1 into the library
Fix: duplicate episode tokens/strms from inconsistent title sanitizing
Fix: db.insert_request() could update the wrong row on retry, stuck 'rate_limited' requests
Fix: TorBox timeouts treated as success, writing a .strm before the torrent was ready
Fix: series split across multiple folders due to varying release names
Fix: Jellyfin library refresh had no debounce
Fix: raw IMDb IDs shown instead of titles in notifications/UI
Fix: admin user-table toggle switches rendered incorrectly
Fix: clickable cast hidden behind a z-index conflict
Fix: removed a duplicate, colliding Trakt integration and its database schema conflict
Fix: Web Player status endpoint dropped token/stream_type, causing an infinite HLS retry loop instead of direct playback
Web Player: VA-API hardware acceleration for HEVC (10-bit, no-scaling mode)
Web Player: always transcode HEVC to HLS; direct serve only for H264
Web Player: fixed black screen / corrupt output on Apollo Lake (J3455) with VA-API
Web Player: fixed stale-segment black screen, missing routes, temp-dir and handle leaks
Docker: GID 937 for VA-API renderD128 access
Spore wrapper: EAE detection from output encoder (Shield TV eARC); skip decoder hint when output=copy
Fix: fresh install crash 'no such table: settings' when DB is empty (issue #34)
Security: session fixation fix - session cleared before login
Security: /torbox-webhook and /ui/api/repair-strms now require authentication
Security: /setup/save rejects unknown setting keys; /health no longer leaks exception detail
Fix: TorBox metaDL_done state never matched (lowercase mismatch)
Fix: createtorrent quota recorded before HTTP success
Fix: season-pack regex missed zero-padded season codes
Fix: release_idle() aborted on first network error - now per-item try/except
Fix: aired episodes without strm stuck without 'wanted' status in monitor.py
Fix: retry_queue startup crash on undefined constant
Fix: mp4_faststart ftyp read too small; cache write now atomic
Fix: cleanup and upgrader now write replacement strm before deleting old one
Library movies tab: paginated poster grid (24/page) matching Discover/Watchlist style
Library: search box and All / Available / Wanted filter tabs
New preference: open library posters directly in Jellyfin web (Settings > Preferences)
Jellyfin batch lookup pre-fetched so poster clicks are synchronous (no popup blocker)
Fix: arm64 CI build crash caused by dead spore-builder Dockerfile stage
Fix: Jellyfin click mode now activates instantly after toggling (optimistic session update)
Fix: tvshow.nfo files with 'Season XX' as title repaired with correct series name
Fix: movie NFOs with Jellyfin collection tags causing '()' in title removed
Fix: xml escaping for & in titles (e.g. Myths & Monsters) in generated NFOs
Fix: season.nfo files removed - were causing Jellyfin to display season name instead of series name
Admin: new maintenance action to repair tvshow NFO titles (Admin > Maintenance)
Mycelium Spore: custom Plex integration without rclone, FUSE or local storage (experimental)
Spore: direct TorBox CDN streaming via transcoder wrapper and stub MKV library
Spore: fast-start cache for instant playback, auto-updates tracks after first play
Fix: TorBox outage no longer causes 6-hour retry delay for affected items
Fix: HDR10+ no longer treated as HDR10 fallback in DV P5 filter
Fix: bulk rename items stored with raw IMDB codes as title (Admin > Maintenance > Fix IMDB titles)
webplayer: HEVC compatibility fix for browser playback
WEBHOOK_SECRET auto-generation with copy button in admin
Setup wizard closes after first run (re-open via Settings)
Metrics endpoint secured with optional Bearer token
WebDAV auth hardening and security headers
Rate limiting on auth endpoints
Docker Hub CI/CD pipeline on release tags
Splash screen as login background
LITE_MODE for webhook-only deployments without heavy schedulers
Setup wizard UI improved
Settings tab in admin
Web Player plugin: in-browser HLS player with subtitle picker
Trakt plugin: watchlist sync and ratings
Plugin slot system for frontend integration
webplayer: HDR detection, SDR-only release selection, multi-audio HLS
Redesigned React SPA with library status and region picker
Multi-user authentication with roles (admin/user)
OIDC/SSO support
Users tab in admin with pending approvals
Security hardening: open redirect fix, /setup auth guard
First public release
Seerr webhook intake, TorBox integration, .strm generation
React SPA with Discover, Library, Requests, Wanted tabs
Jellyfin integration via /stream/<token> catbox proxy
